title: What Is the ‘Heat Dome’ Causing Europe’s Record Temperatures?
summary_full: Heat domes happen all over the world, and the one over Europe this week is locking in days of near-record highs across Britain, Spain and France.
summary_public: Heat domes happen all over the world, and the one over Europe this week is locking in days of near-record highs across Britain, Spain and France.
